feedback: Customer support resolved my billing issue within 10 minutes of connecting. The agent was knowledgeable and polite and did not transfer me to multiple departments like other carriers do. Really impressed with the efficiency and professionalism of the entire interaction.

Worst customer support experience ever. Waited 40 minutes on hold only to be disconnected. Called back and the agent had no clue about my previous complaint. Had to explain everything from scratch three times before anyone understood the network issue I was facing.
plz improve ur custmer support. waited 30 mins on call and still no resolution. very frustrating experience every single time
Customer support was helpful and quick. Issue fixed in one call.

The customer support team went above and beyond to help me resolve a complex roaming issue. They stayed on the line for 25 minutes patiently walking me through the settings and even followed up the next day to confirm everything was working properly. This is how support should be.
Customer support is average. Nothing remarkable about the experience.
omg worst custmer care experience. agent was rude and unhelpful. asked me to call back later when i already waited 20 mins. never again

I contacted customer support about my internet speed dropping to unusable levels every evening. The agent not only logged the complaint but also escalated it to the technical team who called me back within two hours with a fix. The speed is back to normal now. Excellent service.
Customer care handled my query. Standard response nothing special.
cant blv the custmer support agent hung up on me. i was asking about my billing prblm and he just disconnected. absolutely disgraceful behavior

Customer support chat feature in the app is very convenient. I resolved my data balance query without making a single phone call. The bot handled the initial screening and a human agent took over smoothly when needed. Modern and efficient system.
Support team was okay. Got the job done eventually.

I raised a complaint about network coverage issues three weeks ago and customer support has not provided any update since. Every time I follow up they say it is being worked on but nothing changes. The lack of accountability is infuriating for someone paying a premium.
Quick response from customer care when I called about recharge failure.
ngl the customer support has improved a lot recently. got my issue resolved in under 5 minutes which never used to happen before. maybe they hired better people

Customer support is absolutely terrible. I have been trying to get a SIM activation issue resolved for five days now. Each agent gives me a different answer and nobody takes ownership. One said wait 24 hours another said visit the store and a third said resubmit documents. Complete chaos.
Professional customer support team. Standard interaction overall.
tbh ok customer support. not great not terrible. they eventually solve things but it takes multiple calls sometimes

Called customer support to understand the pricing difference between two recharge plans. The agent explained everything clearly and even recommended a plan that better suited my usage pattern which saved me money. Rare to find support staff who actually care about the customer.
Customer support is hard to reach. Long wait times always.
ur custmer support number is always busy. tried calling 5 times today. cant even get through to complain about my network prblm. what is the point

The customer support experience was mixed. The first agent was unhelpful and dismissive but after I requested escalation the supervisor was excellent. Resolved my billing dispute on the spot and credited the overcharged amount within minutes. Leadership makes a difference.
Excellent customer care. No complaints whatsoever.

Customer support agent was patient and helped me set up my 5G connection properly. I was struggling with the APN settings and she walked me through each step until everything was working perfectly. Appreciated the extra effort on a technical issue.
Average support experience. Nothing to highlight either way.
plz train ur support staff better. the agent i spoke to had zero knowledge about data validity plans. gave me wrong information that wasted my money. very unprofessional

Impressed with how quickly customer support handles requests through the app chat. My call quality issue was acknowledged and escalated within two minutes of me describing it. Got a resolution callback within the hour. Far better than the phone support experience.
Customer support response time is acceptable. Standard process.
v bad custmer service. agent told me my complaint was registered but when i called back next day they said no record exists. had to start all over again. total waste of time

Customer support fixed my internet speed issue overnight. Very responsive team that clearly takes technical complaints seriously. The follow-up call the next morning to confirm the resolution was a nice professional touch that I have not experienced with other carriers.
Decent customer support. They try their best but nothing stands out.

The IVR system is terrible and customer support is impossible to reach directly. You have to navigate through 7 menu options before you can speak to a human. By the time someone picks up you have already wasted 15 minutes. The actual agents are fine but the system makes it painful.
Called about a billing error and the support agent corrected it immediately.
omg the customer support wait time is insane. 45 minutes just to speak to someone about a simple reacharg issue. by the time they answered i forgot what i was calling about lol

Customer support via WhatsApp is surprisingly efficient. Much better than calling their helpline. I got my data balance discrepancy resolved through a quick chat conversation without any hold time or IVR navigation. This should be their primary support channel.
Support was neither helpful nor unhelpful. Just standard.
intrenet speed has been terrible for weeks and custmer support keeps saying the same thing - restart your phone. i have done that 10 times already. give me a real solution
Customer care experience was fine. Agent was polite enough.

I appreciate that their customer support is available 24/7 unlike some carriers that close at 10 PM. Had a network issue at midnight during an important work deadline and the agent helped me troubleshoot and escalate it right then. The internet speed was restored within an hour.
Customer support could be better. Needs more trained staff.
ngl disappointed with customer care lately. used to be great but now feels like theyre reading scripts without actually listening to the problem. very robotic responses

Had a positive experience with customer support regarding my value for money concern. The agent proactively suggested a cheaper plan that better matched my usage and even processed the change during the call itself. Saved me 100 rupees per month.
Support staff is polite but slow in resolving actual issues.
ur custmer support is useless. called about call quality issues 3 times this month. every time they say they will fix it but nothing changes. just empty promises

Excellent customer support experience today. The agent was empathetic and resolved my concern about unexpected billing charges within a single interaction. She explained each charge clearly and reversed the ones that were incorrectly applied. This is the standard all telecom support should aim for.
Customer support is okay. Gets things done but takes time.

The self-service options on the app have reduced my need to contact customer support entirely. I can check my data balance, change my recharge plan, and view billing history all without waiting on hold. When I did need human help, the chat was responsive.
Terrible customer care. No follow-up on raised complaints.
prblm is that custmer support agents dont have authority to do anything. they just log complaints and say someone will call back. no one ever calls back. pointless system

Customer support helped me activate international roaming in minutes. Smooth process and the agent confirmed all the pricing details before activation so there were no surprises when I traveled. Very professional handling of the entire request.
Average customer support. Nothing special about the interaction.

Called customer support about my 5G not working after switching plans. The agent immediately identified the configuration issue and pushed new settings to my phone over the air. Within five minutes my 5G was working perfectly. Best support call I have ever made.
Customer support is unreachable during weekends. Very inconvenient.
cant blv how rude the custmer care agent was today. i politely asked about my data validity and she snapped at me saying check the app yourself. is this how u treat paying customers
Customer support is functional. Does what it needs to do.

The escalation process in customer support works well. When the first level agent could not solve my persistent call quality issue she immediately connected me with a technical specialist who ran diagnostics remotely and identified a tower configuration problem in my area.
Customer support response time on chat is acceptable. Standard speed.
v bad experience with support. agent kept transferring me between departments. no one wanted to own my network coverage complaint. wasted one full hour of my day for nothing

Customer support gave wrong information about my plan benefits which led me to exceed my data limit unknowingly. Had to pay extra charges because of their misguidance. When I complained about it they refused to take responsibility or reverse the charges.
Support team is adequate. They handle complaints at normal pace.
tbh the customer support is middling. sometimes great sometimes terrible. depends entirely on which agent picks up ur call. no consistency in quality

I had a billing dispute of 500 rupees and customer support not only resolved it on the first call but also provided a complimentary data voucher as goodwill. This kind of proactive customer retention effort makes me want to stay with this carrier long term.
Customer support takes too long to respond. Needs improvement.
Called support about my reacharg not getting activated. agent was helpful and fixed it in 2 mins. good experience this time unlike previous calls where they kept me waiting

The customer support chatbot is useless for anything beyond basic queries. It keeps looping the same irrelevant suggestions and never actually connects you to a real person. I had a genuine internet speed complaint that required human judgment and was stuck with a bot for 20 minutes.
Customer care accessible through multiple channels. Standard options.
plz make it easier to reach a human agent. the automated system is terrible and keeps going in circles. by the time i reach someone im already angry which doesnt help anyone

Great customer support for premium plan users. I get priority queue access which means almost zero wait time. The agents assigned to premium accounts are clearly more experienced and handle complex issues like roaming setup and plan modifications without any fumbling.
Customer support interactions are neither good nor bad lately.

The customer support team failed to resolve my SIM activation issue even after 4 attempts over 3 days. Each time a different agent asked me to submit the same documents again. There is clearly no system to track open tickets across interactions. Very disorganized operation.
Helpful support staff. Answered all my questions patiently.
omg the custmer care is so incompetent. asked them a simple question about data balance and got transferred 3 times. each person gave different answer. nobody knows anything there

Customer support via social media is actually responsive and fast. I tweeted about my pricing concern and got a DM within 30 minutes with a resolution. Their social media team clearly understands the urgency of public complaints and acts accordingly. Good channel for quick fixes.
Support is standard. Not particularly fast or slow.

I give full marks to customer support for handling my complex billing issue professionally. The charges were confusing but the agent broke down every line item and identified where the error was. She reversed the incorrect charges and my next bill reflected the correction perfectly.
Customer support is poor. Agents lack basic product knowledge.
intrenet is slow and custmer support has no fix for it. been 2 weeks since i raised the complaint. they keep saying engineering team is working on it but nothing happens

Positive experience with the callback feature. No waiting on hold anymore. I registered for a callback and received a call within 15 minutes from a well-trained agent who resolved my query about value for money plans efficiently. This is much better than the old system.
Customer care is fine. Nothing to complain or praise.
ngl custmer support has gone downhill since last year. wait times have doubled and agent knowledge is clearly worse than before. feels like they cut staff or outsourced everything

Customer support email response came within 4 hours which is reasonable. The agent addressed all three of my questions about network coverage in my new area, recommended the best plan for my usage, and even provided a direct number for future escalations. Very thorough.
Adequate customer support. Meets basic expectations.
plz hire more custmer care agents. every time i call its 20-30 min wait. the agents themselves are fine once u get through but getting through is the prblm. very irritating for urgent issues

Customer support resolved my concern about data validity being incorrect on my plan. The agent confirmed it was a display error in the app and my actual validity was correct. Quick and clear communication. Would have been nice to not have the error in the first place though.
Terrible hold times. Customer support needs more staff urgently.

The customer support team proactively called me to inform about a network maintenance window in my area. They explained the timing and duration and apologized for any inconvenience in advance. This kind of proactive communication is rare and highly appreciated.
Customer support quality depends on the agent. Very inconsistent.
cant blv the support agent tried to upsell me a premium plan when i called to complain about slow intrenet. instead of fixing my prblm they want me to pay more. shameless behavior

Good customer care available through multiple touchpoints. The WhatsApp support channel is particularly effective for quick queries. I appreciate that they offer self-service for routine tasks and human agents for complex problems. Well designed support ecosystem.
Customer support answered my query. Standard experience overall.

I am extremely frustrated with customer support. My billing shows charges for a plan I explicitly cancelled two months ago. Three calls and two complaint tickets later nobody has bothered to fix it or reverse the charges. This feels like deliberate theft at this point.
Prompt customer support. Issue resolved on first attempt.

The customer support experience has been consistently excellent over my three years with this carrier. Whether it is billing queries, technical issues with internet speed, or plan recommendations, the agents always handle things professionally and resolve matters quickly.
Mediocre customer support. Room for improvement certainly exists.
reacharg failed and custmer support took 3 days to credit back my money. meanwhile i had no data balance for 3 days. this is unacceptable for a paid service. they should have emergency credits
Happy with customer care responsiveness on the priority line.

Customer support is there but nothing about the experience stands out. They process requests at a normal pace and provide standard answers. Not particularly warm or cold just professional and functional which I suppose is adequate for a telecom carrier.
Horrible support. Agent argued with me about my own usage data.

ur support is the only reason i stay with this carrier tbh. network could be better and pricing is average but whenever i have a prblm the custmer care team actually fixes it properly. rare for telecom companies

Customer support helped me downgrade my plan without any retention tactics or guilt tripping. The agent was professional and processed the change immediately when I explained my budget constraints. Also clarified the new billing amount clearly. Respectful interaction.
